refactoring_session.summary: Extract duplicated utilities, unify polling loops, fix CI/linter settings, clean up naming, encapsulate global state, and split monolithic Execute function.

prs.title: refactor: extract duplicated utilities
prs.notes: Pure moves only. No behavior change.

prs.title: refactor: extract ExponentialBackoffLoop for status polling
prs.notes: Loop body extracted verbatim into reusable helper.

prs.title: chore: enable linters and fix CI inconsistencies
prs.notes: Added explicit linters. Fixed format check to fail on diff. Aligned upload-artifact versions.

prs.title: refactor: extract duplicated GetTypeName into SchemaUtility
prs.notes: C# GetTypeName logic consolidated. No behavior change.

prs.title: refactor: naming clean-up
prs.notes: Renamed identifiers to match Go/C# conventions. ColorTeal -> ColorGold.

prs.title: refactor: encapsulate instance cache into InstanceCache struct
prs.notes: Package-level cache variables moved into InstanceCache. defaultCache singleton.

prs.title: refactor: encapsulate client.Debug into Client struct
prs.notes: Added Client struct with Debug field. DefaultClient singleton. Preserved Send/SendBatch top-level wrappers.

prs.title: refactor: remove global currentCategory, pass category explicitly
prs.notes: Eliminated global currentCategory string. All helpers now accept explicit category parameter.

prs.title: refactor: split Execute into runStandaloneCommand and runUnityCommand
prs.notes: Extracted standalone and Unity-connected command switches into separate functions. Execute reduced from ~180 to ~50 lines.

prs.title: refactor: extract async polling pattern into poll.WaitForAsyncJob
prs.notes: Consolidated duplicate async polling + log suppression pattern into poll.WaitForAsyncJob.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from pingCmd
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return. main.go's run() handles exit code uniformly.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from flag parse failure
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return. Removed duplicated stderr output logic.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from resp.Success check
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return including resp.Message. Unified exit code handling in main.go.

remaining_candidates: C# Tool action dispatch boilerplate (8+ files duplication)
runUnityCommand case-specific send irregularities (test/manage_packages local closures)
Expand test coverage (doctor, install, poll, assetconfig)
Send vs SendBatch HTTP logic duplication (Debug logging, status check)
